tracks.rawText: 4:54Darkv5.5Orchestral rock anthem with cinematic production, Features a prominent grand piano playing a repetitive eighth-note ostinato in the mid-range, A baritone male vocal delivers a dramatic performance, transitioning from a breathy chest voice to a powerful, belted head voice in the chorus, The arrangement builds with a staccato string section and deep, resonant orchestral percussion including timpani and concert bass drum, Distorted electric guitars enter during the chorus with sustained power chords and a thick, saturated tone, A soaring legato string ensemble provides melodic counterpoint in the higher register, The track is in the key of D minor with a tempo of 76 BPM in 4/4 time, The production uses heavy hall reverb on the vocals and drums to create a vast spatial imagePublishRemix
tracks.title: Dark

tracks.rawText: 4:09Left Youv5.5Psychedelic textures drive the song with warbling electric guitar, swirling organs, and pulsating bass, Layered percussion and reverb-soaked drums underpin trippy effects, shifting tempos, and phase-heavy synths, Vocal lines weave through spacious, echoing soundscapes, distorded, deep female singer, strong male vocal, bass riff, booming 808s11PublishRemix
tracks.title: Left You

tracks.rawText: 2:46Ancestral Pulsev5.5neo-psychedelia reggae fusion with soft trap influence, lush female vocals dripping confidence and cosmic glamour, shimmering synths, deep bass, elegant rhythm, “Quantum Luxurious” — luxury as a state of mind, dripping gold and starlight, sensual and introspective vibe21PublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 3:32Ancestral Pulsev5.5Maximum-intensity psytrance ritual with no intro build: 145 BPM driving four-on-the-floor kick, rolling offbeat bass, and relentless tribal percussion, Frame drums, congas, shakers, tom ensembles, handclaps, and ritual chants sit over hypnotic arpeggiated synths, resonant filter sweeps, psy-delays, and acidic lead motifs in a dark, earthy, high-energy mix21PublishRemix
tracks.title: Ancestral Pulse
